_comment: Advisory per-turn hot-path latency ceilings in ms, checked by scripts/perf-bench.js (npm run perf). Limits are generous (roughly 25-50x the measured baseline on dev hardware) so the harness only fires on a real regression, not normal machine-to-machine variance. Not wired into the release gate. Measured at N=100 (= MAX_PATTERN_COUNT*2, the bounded operating worst case).
